title: The Cartographer's Last Meridian
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In 1520s Seville, a blind cartographer who sailed with Magellan discovers the Crown's official world map deliberately omits a southern continent, and he must smuggle a true map out of the royal archive before the Inquisition silences him permanently.
long_description: In 1520s Seville, a blind cartographer who sailed with Magellan discovers the Crown's official world map deliberately omits a southern continent, and he must smuggle a true map out of the royal archive before the Inquisition silences him permanently.
